summary: Iteration 27 - Promo Code, Discount, and Pending Assignment Features Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. All new features verified working: (1) Promo code validation (TEST20 = 20% off), (2) Sale creation with promo + additional discount, (3) Price breakdown calculation (50000 - 20% - 5% = 38000), (4) Sale approval without case manager creates 'pending_assignment' case, (5) Pending Assignment tab shows unassigned cases with Select Manager dropdown, (6) Manager assignment changes case status to 'active', (7) Discount badges displayed on Admin and Partner sales cards.

issues:

cannot be descendant of

in Badge component - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Email service is MOCKED - logs to email_logs collection instead of sending real emails
Promo code TEST20 (20% percentage discount) is pre-seeded and working
Discount calculation is correct: promo applied first, then additional discount on remaining amount
seed_data_creation: TEST_* prefixed sales and cases created during testing for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 verified all new promo/discount/assignment features: (1) POST /api/marketing/promo/validate - validates promo codes, (2) POST /api/sales with promo_code and discount_percentage Form params - calculates discounts correctly, (3) POST /api/sales/approve without case_manager_id creates case with status='pending_assignment', (4) GET /api/cases/unassigned - admin only, returns unassigned cases, (5) PUT /api/cases/{id}/assign-manager - assigns manager and changes status to 'active'. Frontend: Partner New Sale form has Promo Code input with Apply button and Additional Discount (%) input with live Price Breakdown. Admin Pending Assignment tab shows unassigned cases with Select Manager dropdown. Discount badges (Promo, Additional, Total Savings) shown on both Admin and Partner sales cards.

backend_endpoints.promo_validate_valid: PASS - POST /api/marketing/promo/validate with TEST20 returns valid=true, discount_type=percentage, discount_value=20
backend_endpoints.sale_with_promo_discount: PASS - POST /api/sales with promo_code=TEST20, discount_percentage=5, fee=50000 returns final_fee=38000, discount_applied=true
backend_endpoints.sale_without_discount: PASS - POST /api/sales without promo/discount returns normal fee, discount_applied=false
backend_endpoints.approve_without_manager: PASS - POST /api/sales/approve without case_manager_id returns assignment_pending=true, creates case with status='pending_assignment'
backend_endpoints.approve_with_manager: PASS - POST /api/sales/approve with case_manager_id creates case with status='active'
backend_endpoints.unassigned_cases_admin: PASS - GET /api/cases/unassigned returns list of unassigned cases for admin
backend_endpoints.assign_manager: PASS - PUT /api/cases/{id}/assign-manager assigns manager and changes status to 'active'
backend_endpoints.sale_discount_fields: PASS - Sale response includes promo_code, promo_discount_amount, additional_discount_percentage, additional_discount_amount, total_discount_amount, fee_before_discount
backend_endpoints.full_flow: PASS - Complete flow: Partner creates sale with promo → Admin approves without manager → Case in Pending Assignment → Admin assigns manager → Case becomes 'active'

frontend_features.partner_new_sale_promo_input: PASS - Promo Code input with Apply button present in New Sale dialog
frontend_features.partner_new_sale_discount_input: PASS - Additional Discount (%) input present in New Sale dialog
frontend_features.partner_new_sale_price_breakdown: PASS - Price Breakdown section shows Original Fee, Promo discount, Additional discount, Final Fee
frontend_features.partner_promo_validation: PASS - Apply button validates promo code and shows success/error message
frontend_features.partner_sales_discount_badges: PASS - Sales cards show Promo, Additional, Total Savings badges with amounts
frontend_features.admin_pending_assignment_tab: PASS - Sidebar shows 'Pending Assignment' tab with badge count
frontend_features.admin_pending_assignment_content: PASS - Tab shows unassigned cases with Select Manager dropdown
frontend_features.admin_select_manager: PASS - Selecting manager from dropdown assigns case and shows success toast
frontend_features.admin_sales_discount_badges: PASS - Admin sales cards show Promo, Additional, Original/Discount badges

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - send_email logs to email_logs collection instead of sending real emails
